meta.title: Samantha — Canonical Design Decisions
meta.description: Complete index of every canonical design decision across the Samantha/Hermes ecosystem. Single source of truth. Every principle, model choice, architectural decision, tool selection, skill classification, and anti-pattern.

philosophy.source: Clark & Chalmers Extended Mind Thesis (1998) — operationalized for AI agents
philosophy.notes: Everything is in skill files, config, or markdown. The SOUL is ~800 chars — an identity, not a procedure.

philosophy.source: Dochkina 2026, Google Scaling Agent Study — validated dynamic delegation
philosophy.notes: CEO delegates to temp workers. max_spawn_depth=3, max_concurrent=3. Sub-agents have no SOUL/personality.

philosophy.source: Simon's v3.1 distillation model + repo Funnel Cognition 4-stage
philosophy.notes: Two complementary models: 4-stage Funnel (Chaotic→Distillation→Categorization→Structured) and 3-phase Distillation Cycle (DÉMÊLER→DISTILLER→DÉCIDER). Both active.

philosophy.source: Anthropic Context Engineering, Stigmem ("Stop Preloading Everything")
philosophy.notes: Skills loaded on demand (2-layer: core always, auto-detect on trigger). Context funnel pipeline. Target: 500K→100K token reduction.

models.rationale: Think-through-agent speed > raw model power. Ratio qualité/prix absurde.
models.evidence: USER.md: 'Flash > Pro for 99%'. Config now reflects this.

models.rationale: Complex reasoning, architectural critiques, edge cases where Flash insufficient
models.notes: Simon explicitly prefers Flash for 99% of cases. Pro only when asked or when Flash fails.

models.rationale: Non-vision primary model needs auxiliary vision
models.notes: Via vision_analyze tool with auxiliary vision model. Only for images.

models.rationale: Avoid Gemini hallucinations in curator. Dedicated fixed config.
models.notes: Forced in config to prevent dry-run mode. Skill: config-verification-patterns.

models.rationale: Sweet spot confirmed empirically: low reasoning gives ~80% of gain vs none→high (+26% AA Index at same cost). High shows diminishing returns (+1% vs low). Max triggers overthinking (GDPval Elo: High 1414 > Max 1388). Apple 'The Illusion of Thinking' (NeurIPS 2025) confirms 3-regime model: low/medium complexity benefits from reasoning, high collapses. Decision: default low, none for trivial ops, high for complex reasoning tasks only.
models.label: reasoning-effort-low-sweet-spot
models.evidence: AA Index: none=36.5, high=46.0, max=46.5 (same $0.175/M). GDPval Elo: none=1393, high=1414, max=1388. Apple Shojaee et al. 2025.

architecture.details: Core: 14 always-loaded skills in system prompt. Auto-detect: ~76 skills loaded on trigger. priority: core/standard/niche/one-shot classification in YAML frontmatter.
architecture.source: Anthropic Agent Skills L1/L2 model + custom classification

architecture.decision: Sub-agents as empty shells with explicit context injection
architecture.details: No SOUL, no personality, no auto-loaded skills. All context injected at delegation time. max_concurrent=3, max_spawn_depth=3.
system-audit, soul-cross-check, skills-classifier-audit, hub-scout-scan. All depend on hermes gateway.
Lazy loading, history truncation (last 10 turns), compact memory index, compression proxy, sub-agent offloading.
architecture.source: Stigmem, SRA-Bench, Lost in the Middle

architecture.details: Allowed: skills/, knowledge/, agents/, AGENTS.md, /tmp/. Never: system files, .env, existing files without permission.
architecture.source: Cognitive hygiene — prevents orphan files and context leaks

architecture.decision: Max 1 nudge per conversation. Loving drill sergeant.
architecture.details: One sentence nudge → execute. 3 failures → STOP and root cause. Warm after technical exchanges.
None for trivial ops, low for default (captures ~80% gain), high for complex tasks, never max. Pricing flat across all levels for DeepSeek V4 Flash.
architecture.source: AA Index data + Apple 'The Illusion of Thinking' (NeurIPS 2025)

tools.details: Tavily: general search, crawl, extract. Exa: semantic search, fetch. Jina: read, parallel read, screenshots, classify, academic search.
MCP servers discovered automatically. No manual server config needed for most tools.
Cannot use Anthropic models via OpenRouter. Fallback: direct API or alternative providers.

skills.decision: One-shot tier: ~10 skills, per-use deletion candidates

skills.details: Overrides default. Prevents Gemini hallucinations in curation. Skip dry-run, always run.

observations.principle: Externalize everything? No. Search everywhere, externalize what survives.

observations.notes: Context management is the bottleneck. Model choice matters less. Speed is downstream of both.

observations.principle: Diminishing returns on reasoning effort hit faster than expected
observations.notes: Low captures ~80% of none→high gain. High→Max gives +1% but triggers overthinking. Sweet spot = low.

anti_patterns.solution: Session output goes to agents/. Memory is for durable facts only.
Default: low. None for trivial ops. High for complex tasks. Never max.

anti_patterns.pattern: Verbose memory entries (paragraphs instead of lines)
anti_patterns.solution: Each memory entry = one line, one fact. Compact index.
